final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, themed around the GPT-5.5 launch, with 奥特曼 as the keynote speaker.

Style/medium: needs a high-end China domestic roadshow / LP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy and speaker credit
Subject: must include the GPT-5.5 launch theme and 奥特曼 as keynote speaker
Scene/backdrop: needs a tech-forward, prestige institutional backdrop — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative atmosphere fitting a top-tier GP fundraising event — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with premium Chinese institutional finance / GP aesthetics (deep navy, gold, or similar gravitas palette) — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, print-quality surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (primary title), "奥特曼" (speaker name), and a subtitle line indicating 融资路演 / 发布主题
Constraints: must preserve domestic China roadshow conventions: formal layout, institutional credibility signals, GP-grade visual tone
Avoid: must avoid casual startup aesthetics, overly Western Silicon Valley visual language, cluttered layouts
